news.title: Warren Buffett on the market today: 'It's tough to find values when everybody is preferring gambling'
news.summary: The investor has been sharply critical of the stock market. He says it is increasingly defined by speculative trading as opposed to long-term investing.

news.title: Wholesale prices unexpectedly declined 0.3% in June on big drop in gasoline
news.summary: The index benefited from easing energy costs, particularly as oil fell due to the brief pause in tensions between the U.S. and Iran.

news.title: New York Fed President Williams says inflation has peaked, rates 'well positioned'
news.summary: Mr. Williams cited five reasons why he expects the latest price surge has run its course. Mr. Williams said he believes the current price surge will soon run out of steam.

news.title: ‘Arsenal of democracy’: Jamie Dimon announces $24 million effort to boost American shipbuilding
news.summary: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon unveiled a $24 million package to bolster American shipbuilding. The package includes funding a new submarine facility at the Philadelphia Navy Yard.

news.title: Watch Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh testify live before Senate banking committee
news.summary: Warsh spoke Tuesday to the House Financial Services Committee. It was part of congressionally mandated Capitol Hill appearances for the central bank leader.

news.title: PayPal’s battered stock is getting a record boost from a report of buyout interest
news.summary: PayPal shares had their best day ever on Wednesday. A report said rival Stripe is teaming up with private-equity group Advent International on a bid.

news.title: Paychecks are rising faster than prices for a change — but when will consumers feel the relief?
news.summary: Wage growth in June outpaced inflation, after falling behind during April and May. Wage growth in May and April fell behind inflation, but outpaced it in May.

news.title: These are the toughest places in America to sell a home right now
news.summary: Homeowners are seeing their homes sit on the market for longer before getting an offer. From Miami to Seattle, homes are being held for longer than expected.

news.title: How this small-cap stock picker’s ‘ownership’ approach has helped him beat the Russell 2000
news.summary: An active value and quality-based approach can be an advantage in a part of the stock market dominated by index funds. An active value approach can give you an advantage over index funds in a market that is dominated by them.

news.title: ‘They cut off online access’: My mother’s bank balance plummeted after her death. What’s going on?
news.summary: Since her death, her bank balance fell to $9,000 from $16,000. “Since herDeath, Her Bank Balance has fallen to $8,000,” her family says.
